vocab.meaning: sự phấn khích tột độ/không kiềm chế
vocab.example: I remember the unbridled exhilaration I felt whenever my father revved the engine for a long trip.
The rhythmic cadence of the car moving along the asphalt often acted as a tranquilizer for me.

vocab.meaning: sự gò bó khi phải ngồi yên một chỗ
vocab.example: To be honest, as a hyperactive child, I occasionally loathed the sedentary confinement of a twelve-hour drive.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy cảm giác kinh ngạc/ngưỡng mộ
vocab.example: Passing through the giant mountain tunnels would always incite a sense of awe in my younger self.

vocab.meaning: cuộc trò chuyện/đàm đạo của cha mẹ
vocab.example: I enjoyed eavesdropping on the sophisticated parental discourse while pretending to be asleep in the back.

vocab.meaning: kiến thức/sự am hiểu về địa lý
vocab.example: Those early road trips significantly bolstered my geographic literacy as I watched the terrain transform from plains to peaks.

vocab.meaning: những cảm giác về xúc giác
vocab.example: I loved the tactile sensations of the cool leather seats against my skin during our summer excursions.

vocab.meaning: một sự tạm nghỉ/giải thoát dễ chịu
vocab.example: Stopping at a roadside diner was always a welcome reprieve from the stuffiness of the vehicle.

vocab.meaning: cuộc phiêu lưu gián tiếp (qua việc quan sát)
vocab.example: Watching other travelers from the car window gave me a taste of vicarious adventure.
My olfactory memories of childhood car trips are dominated by the scent of old upholstery and my mother’s perfume.
